one_time_description: Large annual deficit of $38.6M driven by administration expenses of $57.7M vs budget of $6.5M, likely related to Williams Treaty and Islands in the Trent settlement distributions from investments (investments dropped from $96.8M to $51M)
economic_notes: Old Railroad Stop commercial operations generating ~$17.2M revenue. Zhooniya Makak GP Inc., Zhooniya Makak LP, and AKI Land Holdings Inc. are consolidated subsidiaries. Williams Treaty settlement and Islands in the Trent settlement funds held in investments.
notes: Massive deficit of $38.6M in FY2024 vs surplus of $3.5M in FY2023. Administration expenses were $57.7M vs budget of $6.5M - this appears driven by distribution of Williams Treaty and Islands in the Trent settlement funds to members (investments dropped ~$45.9M from $96.9M to $51M). Restricted cash includes Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership ($1.88M) and Lottery ($13.6K) externally restricted, plus Williams Treaty ($1.33M) and Islands in the Trent ($3.2K) internally restricted. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $9.55M + Federal other $2.40M + Province of Ontario $1.91M = $13.86M. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $2.72M + due to government $1.23M + deferred revenue $5.66M = $9.61M (excluding bank loan $18.93M as long-term). OSR includes Old Railroad Stop, investment income, OFNLP, and other revenues.
